sections.title: If Xilo and Fabia have not been reunited

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: I can't belive Xilo hasn't shown up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Were you expecting to meet someone here?

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: My... friend, Xilo. I told her to meet me by the magic trees of the rainforest. We don't often have a chance to meet without a crowd of people around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why? Is she not particularly local to you?

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: Unfortunately not. I'm from Aldarin, but she lives in Tal Teklan. It usually takes a special event being hosted for us both to be in the same place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you never really get any privacy?

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: Privacy? Are you insinuating something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not at all. Sorry if it seemed like I was.

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: It's okay... Sorry... I just miss her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think she's just running a little late?

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: It's possible.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could she maybe have considered another tree magical?

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: I suppose she may be where we first met... but this is where we shared our first... you know...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll keep my fingers crossed for you. I'm sure you'll be able to find one another soon!

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: Thank you, iknami.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on... I think I might have met this Xilo.

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: You have? Where is she?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: By a tree to the north of here.

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: Oh, Xilo! She's gone to where we first met instead! Thank you, iknami. I'll head over there at once!

sections.title: If Xilo and Fabia have been reunited

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: Hello again, iknami! Thank you for helping us find each other!

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: To think we were waiting by different trees! It was so silly of us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm happy to see you together again. Now, I'm sure you have a lot of catching up to do. I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: Timoiva, iknami!
